post.topic: 4 Essential Claude API Tips for Better Development Workflow
post.hook: 4 Claude API tricks that will level up your development game instantly 🚀
post.caption:
4 Claude API tricks that will level up your development game instantly 🚀

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: 4 Claude API Developer Essentials
slides.subtitle: Tips to supercharge your AI integration workflow

slides.title: Stream Responses for Better UX
slides.body: Use streaming to show real-time responses instead of waiting for complete output. Your users will love the instant feedback!

slides.title: Set Max Tokens Strategically
slides.body: Control response length and costs by setting max_tokens. Use 1000 for summaries, 4000 for detailed analysis.
slides.code_snippet:
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-sonnet-20240229",
    max_tokens=1000,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]
)

slides.title: Use System Prompts Effectively
slides.body: System prompts set Claude's behavior and context. Perfect for defining roles, output formats, and consistent responses.
slides.code_snippet:
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-sonnet-20240229",
    system="You are a Python expert. Always include error handling.",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Help me write a function"}]
)

slides.title: Handle Rate Limits Gracefully
slides.body: Implement exponential backoff to handle rate limits automatically. Your app stays stable during high traffic periods.

slides.title: Want More Claude Tips?
slides.body: Follow @ask.claudeai for daily AI development tips and save this post for reference!
